title: odontosoria divaricata
intro: Odontosoria divaricata, also known as the forked-tipped fern, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is an herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Odontosoria divaricata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes dried and made into a powder for use in herbal supplements.
